overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a Viking character walking through a snowy mountain pass during golden hour. The character carries a shield and bow while traversing deep snow between rocky cliffs and distant peaks, with dramatic sunlight creating lens flare effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail between rock face and open valley

agents.ego_description: Viking character walking steadily through deep snow along a mountain path, carrying a round shield on back and a bow

entered.detail: tall sheer rock wall with vertical striations, partially covered in snow
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background valley
single evergreen tree standing in the middle of the snowy path ahead
deep snow covering the mountain trail with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy mountain path with a large rocky cliff face on the right and distant snow-covered peaks visible ahead. The sun is low behind the character creating a warm backlit silhouette effect against the white snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with direct sun exposure

events.description: sun moves directly behind character creating intense lens flare and bloom effect

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the sun creates a bright glare, partially obscuring the view ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the sun aligns directly behind them, creating a dramatic lens flare that washes out the center of the frame. The rocky cliff on the right draws closer while the distant mountains shift to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching a lone tree

events.description: lens flare diminishes as sun moves to the left side, revealing clearer view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a lone pine tree ahead as the lighting clears and the path becomes more visible

segments.scene_description: As the intense sun flare fades, the character continues approaching a lone pine tree standing in the middle of the snowy path ahead. The rocky cliff remains prominent on the right while the distant mountains are now clearly visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain pass that transitions from a backlit silhouette into a bright, flare-filled vista. It begins with the character walking beside a towering rocky cliff, with distant snow-covered peaks framing the horizon under a low, warm sun. As the character advances, the sun aligns directly behind them, triggering a dramatic lens flare that momentarily washes out the center of the frame while the cliff face draws closer. The scene then shifts as the intense light fades, revealing a lone pine tree standing in the middle of the path ahead. Finally, the camera continues forward, leaving the cliff to the right as the distant mountains become clearly visible to the left.
